job_description:
Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced Technical Project Manager to lead and manage multiple concurrent projects across eCommerce and AI-driven initiatives. This role requires strong ownership, structured execution, and the ability to manage both client expectations and internal delivery teams in a fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Own end-to-end delivery of multiple parallel projects, including both small enhancements and large-scale implementations
  • Define project scope, timelines, milestones, and resource allocation in collaboration with stakeholders
  • Manage cross-functional teams including developers, QA, designers, and individual contributors
  • Track project progress, identify risks, and proactively drive resolution (internal and client-side delays)
  • Ensure deadlines are met or properly communicated with mitigation plans in place
  • Act as the primary point of contact for clients, ensuring clear communication and expectation alignment
  • Maintain detailed project documentation, status reports, and progress dashboards
  • Drive accountability across teams to ensure closure of tasks and projects
  • Participate in planning, budgeting, and resource forecasting
  • Establish and improve project management processes and best practices

Mandatory Skills & Experience

  • 5+ years of experience in Technical Project Management or similar role
  • Strong experience managing eCommerce projects - Shopify or Magento
  • Proven ability to manage multiple concurrent projects with varying priorities
  • Experience working with both teams and individual contributors
  • Strong understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC)
  • Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills
  • Strong problem-solving and escalation handling ability
  • High level of ownership and accountability
  • Familiarity with tools like Jira, Zoho, or similar

Good to Have

  • Experience managing AI/ML or LLM-based projects
  • Exposure to Agile/Scrum methodologies
  • Experience working with global clients, especially US-based

Work Requirements

  • Willingness to work with overlap in US time zones
  • Ability to manage client communications effectively in English (spoken and written fluency is mandatory)

What We Are Looking For

  • Someone who can bring structure to chaos and keep projects moving
  • Strong follow-up and execution mindset (especially when deadlines slip)
  • Ability to balance client expectations vs internal constraints
  • A proactive communicator - not just a tracker, but a driver of outcomes

Contact: Eligible candidates can send resume to hr@vtrio.com
summary: A Technical Project Manager is needed to lead eCommerce and AI projects with 5+ years of experience in structured execution, cross-functional team management, and SDLC expertise.
